privileged_info_summary: This task uses synthetic healthcare data created for testing the MedinTux medical records management system. The test dataset contains exactly 8 patients: 4 male (BERNARD, THOMAS, PETIT, DURAND) and 4 female (MARTIN, DUBOIS, ROBERT, RICHARD). All patients are fictional with fabricated French names, birthdates, and addresses. The task metadata correctly specifies that the patient demographics report should be created at /home/ga/patient_demographics_report.txt. All metadata counts and file path specifications have been independently verified against the setup script and are accurate.
